basic_details.job_title: NIT Goa Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Goa (NIT Goa)
basic_details.short_information: Candidates as per official notification who have B.Tech/B.E./M.Tech./M.E./equivalent in relevant discipline with NET/GATE and minimum 6.5 CGPA or 60% marks are eligible to apply for these Junior Research Fellow (JRF) vacancies. The online application process for NIT Goa JRF Recruitment 2026 has started from 28 April 2026 and will remain open until 15 July 2026.

qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow : B.Tech/B.E./M.Tech./M.E./equivalent in the relevant discipline with NET/GATE and at least 6.5 CGPA or 60 percent marks in aggregate from a recognized technical institute or university in a full-time program.

selection_process: Shortlisting on the basis of merit and need of the project Written Test and/or Interview
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Goa to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download NIT Goa Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Goa Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Overview
NIT Goa Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIT Goa Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIT Goa Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Goa Junior Research Fellow Vacancy Details 2026
NIT Goa Junior Research Fellow Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow : B.Tech/B.E./M.Tech./M.E./equivalent in the relevant discipline with NET/GATE and at least 6.5 CGPA or 60 percent marks in aggregate from a recognized technical institute or university in a full-time program.

content_sections.heading: NIT Goa Junior Research Fellow Salary 2026
NIT Goa Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
NIT Goa Junior Research Fellow Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Shortlisting on the basis of merit and need of the project Written Test and/or Interview

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Goa to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Goa Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Goa JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at NIT Goa is 15-07-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification is B.Tech/B.E./M.Tech./M.E./equivalent in the relevant discipline with NET/GATE and a minimum CGPA of 6.5 or 60% marks.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 37000 + 20% HRA Per Month.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on merit and project requirements, followed by a written test and/or interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the official website of NIT Goa?
faq.answer: The official website of National Institute of Technology Goa is http://www.nitgoa.ac.in.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is NITG/NISAR/Manpower/2026/01.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Junior Research Fellow position is Contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where is NIT Goa located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Goa is located in Cuncolim, Goa, with the pincode 403703.
